title: INtopBackup
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INtopBackup, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: The U.S. seizes another oil tanker as peace talks with Iran remain in limbo
items.description: President Trump says he ordered the Navy to "shoot and kill any boat" putting mines in the Strait of Hormuz as the U.S. ramps up minesweeping there.

items.title: Sycophantic AI flatters and suggests you are not to blame
items.description: The AI models and chatbots that we interact with tend to affirm our feelings and viewpoints — more so than people do, with potentially worrisome conse...

items.title: Tensions rise in two ceasefires in the Middle East. And, the Navy secretary ousted
items.description: Tensions are rising in the Middle East as shaky ceasefire agreements between the U.S., Israel and Iran, and Lebanon and Israel, are tested. And, the S...

items.title: Two startlingly different views on long-awaited data on America's anti-HIV efforts
items.description: After a year without data, the State Department released figures on PEPFAR, the program launched by George W. Bush and credited with saving millions o...

items.title: Peace talks between U.S. and Iran at a standstill as Trump extends ceasefire
items.description: President Trump has extended the ceasefire, but Iran says it's not enough if the naval blockade is still in place.

items.title: John Phelan out as Navy secretary in latest high-profile Trump admin. departure
items.description: Navy Secretary John Phelan is leaving his role effective immediately, chief Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell said​ Wednesday.

items.title: Pope Leo criticises Equatorial Guinea prisons as he winds up Africa tour
items.description: The Pope gives a frank and passionate speech, the likes of which have characterised his tour of Africa.

items.title: Some key groups moved toward Trump in 2024. Here’s what they think now, according to AP-NORC polls
Cotton pushes bill to help critical infrastructure defend against drone threat
items.description: Cotton says current law leaves U.S. power grids, wastewater plants, and other high-risk sites exposed to emerging drone threats.

items.title: Can creditors restart collections after a debt relief program ends?
items.description: Finishing a debt relief program doesn't guarantee that creditors are gone for good. Here's what to know.

items.title: Trump administration reclassifies cannabis as less dangerous
items.description: Medical marijuana was moved into a lower category of drugs in order to increase research and access.

items.title: Two trains collide head-on in Denmark, leaving five critically hurt
items.description: The accident happened early on Thursday at a level crossing north of Copenhagen.

items.title: MrBeast's company sued by ex-employee over sexual harassment claim
items.description: Beast Industries has strongly denied claims of sexual harassment and workplace gender bias.

items.title: Trump reclassifies state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug in a historic shift
items.description: President Donald Trump’s acting attorney general has signed an order reclassifying state-licensed medical marijuana as a less-dangerous drug.

items.title: Iran touts video of ship seizures as Trump keeps quiet on his next move
items.description: Iran releases video showing commandos seizing ships in the Strait of Hormuz as Trump remains largely silent on his next move in the war.

items.title: More than 500 people killed in Tanzania election violence, inquiry finds
items.description: Opposition parties accused security forces but the official report does not say who was responsible.

items.title: Justice Department eases restrictions on some marijuana products
items.description: The order places FDA-approved products containing marijuana and state-regulated medical marijuana products at a lower drug classification.

items.title: Chemical leak at a West Virginia plant kills 2 people and sends 30 more to hospitals, officials say
